info.title: Clash Royale API
info.description: Provides access to Clash Royale game data including player profiles, clans, tournaments, cards, and game locations.

BearerAuth.description: API key obtained from developer.clashroyale.com. Pass as Bearer token in Authorization header.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Search clans by name. If name is used as part of search query, it needs to be at least three characters long.

parameters.name: minMembers
parameters.description: Filter by minimum number of clan members.

parameters.name: maxMembers
parameters.description: Filter by maximum number of clan members.

parameters.name: minScore
parameters.description: Filter by minimum amount of clan score.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of items returned in the response.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Return only items that occur after this marker.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Return only items that occur before this marker.

400.description: Client provided incorrect parameters for the request.

parameters.name: clanTag
parameters.description: Tag of the clan (URL encoded, e.g. %232ABC).

get.summary: Information about clan's current clan war
Information about clan's current river race
Get list of upcoming chests for the player
Get list of recent battles for a player
Get clan rankings for a specific location
Get player rankings for a specific location
Get clan war rankings for a specific location
Get Path of Legend player rankings for a specific location and season
Get list of available and in-progress challenges
